text: Ahead of Q4 2025 earnings, analyst sentiment reflects optimism around AI-driven growth across Cloud, Search, and YouTube segments. Zacks highlighted Alphabet in top analyst reports, noting strong stock outperformance powered by AI initiatives. Market commentary suggests investors are closely monitoring whether AI and cloud momentum can sustain the company's approximately $4 trillion valuation, with particular attention on capital expenditure trends among mega-cap technology peers.
